title: Crash on declared message length = 0 in readMessage()
description: The fuzzer sent a P7 binary message with the 4-byte length header set to 0x00000000. readMessage() only validated length <= maxMessageSize but not length >= 4. With length=0, readExactly(size:0) returned empty Data. P7Message(withData: Data(), spec:) then crashed attempting to read the 4-byte msg_id from an empty buffer.
exploit: Payload: 00000000 [followed by valid TLV content ignored by server]
patch_description: Added guard messageLength >= 4 check before the maxMessageSize check in readMessage(). A length of 0-3 is rejected with readFailed error and the connection is closed cleanly. No crash, no allocation.
